name: Holiday Beef Rib Eye Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine garlic, salt, pepper, and thyme; press evenly into the surface of the roast.
3. Place the roast on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
4. Insert a meat thermometer so that the bulb is centered in the thickest part of the roast.
5. Do not add water or cover with foil.
6. Roast for 18 to 22 minutes per pound for rare to medium doneness.
7. Remove the roast from the oven when the meat thermometer registers 135°F for rare or 155°F for medium. Let stand 15 minutes before carving (the temperature will continue to rise to 140°F for rare and 160°F for medium).
8. In a small saucepan, combine the sauce ingredients. Cook over medium heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Carve the roast into slices; serve with sauce.
